prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbocharger** (hybrid billet wheel, 76mm compressor, 64mm turbine) paired with a **custom 4-into-1 titanium exhaust manifold** (fabricated by Capristo) to optimize spool and flow for the **066/7 1.6L V6 turbo hybrid (Type 066/7E) engine**, targeting 1,000+ hp on E85 with a **Motec M150 ECU** (F1-grade calibration for torque shaping and anti-lag strategies).

Install **Pankl Racing Systems titanium connecting rods** (H-beam, 145mm length, 4340 steel bolts) and **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (9.5:1 CR, DLC-coated skirts, optimized for 35+ bar peak cylinder pressure) to handle the increased boost while maintaining F1-level reliability under sustained 15,000 RPM operation.

Replace the OEM **Ferrari F1-derived hydraulic suspension** with a **Multimatic DSSV (Dynamic Suspensions Spool Valve) coilover system** (3-way adjustable, 200mm travel, carbon-fiber spring perches) paired with **Brembo GT 6-piston monoblock calipers** (390mm carbon-ceramic rotors, titanium pistons) and **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires** (325/680-R18 front, 405/680-R18 rear) for track-specific grip and cooling optimization.
estetica: Fit a **Novitec Rosso SF23-widebody kit** (carbon-fiber, 50mm wider front fenders, 70mm wider rear quarters) with **custom 3D-printed titanium wheel spacers** (15mm front, 20mm rear) to accommodate the **HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels** (18x12.5 +25mm front, 18x15.5 +40mm rear, 6kg per wheel).

Install a **Rocket Bunny V3-style front splitter** (carbon-fiber, 3-stage adjustable, with integrated **AIM Solo 2 DL GPS telemetry mounts**) and a **custom Gurney flap** (titanium, 45mm height, adjustable via quick-release pins) on the **OEM Ferrari rear wing** to balance downforce at 200+ mph.

Replace all OEM body panels with **Forgebond carbon-fiber pre-preg weave** (2x2 twill, 12K finish, 30% lighter than OEM) and apply a **PPG Ferrari Corsa Red matte vinyl wrap** (XPEL Stealth finish) with **custom laser-etched sponsor logos** (e.g., Shell V-Power, Puma, Ray-Ban) on the sidepods and halo.
